emotions & humor — the braid graph

nodes sized by degree · drag to rearrange · tap a feeling for its braids
node hue = the family's Spectrum color
teal ring = dual (also a body attacher)

A force-directed picture of the 12 families and the braids between them. The hubs that drift to the center — grief and fear — are the great modulators: they thread under nearly every other feeling. Click a node to read its braids.
